data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Hardening landed on main: change 326 (commit 9573ddf6a) carries the 'rebar-ticket: 3cf7-56db-cbf2-4ba4' trailer and merged via Gerrit (LLM-Review + Verified green). Force-closing due to the SAME commit-gate false-negative this ticket's sibling work addresses: _referencing_commit_exists (transition_close.py:32) runs 'git log' without --all against repo_root, which resolves via the tracker symlink to the main checkout — currently parked by a parallel session on a stale branch that doesn't contain the commit (the commit IS on origin/main). Verified locally: the wait-for-PyPI step detects a served version and the idempotent publish pre-check treats an already-registered version as a no-op success (stubbed publisher never invoked). The permanent fix (scan --all) is proposed and pending approval.". Session: 9573ddf6a.
